role: Brigadier General; Head, Basij Intelligence (d. 17 March 2026)
bio: Esmail Ahmadi served as a Brigadier General and head of intelligence for the [Basij Forces](/orgs/basij) under the [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps). He was killed on 17 March 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave) targeting senior Iranian military and intelligence leadership.

sources.title: Senior Basij Deputies Killed in Israeli Strikes

editorial_notes: Killed 17 March 2026. Basij Intelligence Head, Brigadier General.
